name: garlic-claw
description: 具备设备控制和自动化功能的AI秘书系统

scripts.dev:server: npm run build:server-runtime-deps && npm run dev -w packages/server
scripts.build:server-runtime-deps: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w packages/plugin-sdk && npm run prisma:generate -w packages/server
scripts.build:server: npm run build:server-runtime-deps && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.test:server: npm run build:server-runtime-deps && npm run test -w packages/server -- --runInBand
scripts.smoke:server: npm run build:server-runtime-deps && npm run smoke:http -w packages/server
